brief: Implement dashboard search using the existing flow and linked note context.
keyFacts: Dashboard search is the first scope.
Preview-only planning is preferred before implementation.
Search should likely start from existing entrypoints.
openQuestions: Where is the current search entrypoint?
Should initial ranking use title only or title plus body?
risks: Repo layout may not match note assumptions.
Search quality may be weak if ranking is too narrow.
